testcase.name: test_01_create_test_order

failure.message: AssertionError: No test order available assert None is not None + where None = TestOrderStatusUpdate.order_id

testcase.name: test_cleanup
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_order_status_update.py:540: in test_cleanup test_orders = [o for o in orders if o.get("doctor_name", "").startswith("TEST_")] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_order_status_update.py:540: in <listcomp> test_orders = [o for o in orders if o.get("doctor_name", "").startswith("TEST_")] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'startswith'
